name: think-twice
description: Forces Claude to pause before any expensive task and ask: is there a smarter way? Triggers before heavy computation, large code generation, or any implementation that feels like hard work. Claude runs a checklist — questioning the problem, the scope, the approach, and whether an existing API, package, or dataset already solves it. Saves thousands of tokens on tasks like: country or city data, authentication, fake data generation, PDF generation, rate limiting, search. The best tokens are the ones you didn't spend.
